task_completion.description: Check out the 4 POS assets to the 'Store #42 - Chicago' location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset lists or details showing POS-TERM-042, POS-SCAN-042, POS-PRNT-042, and POS-PAY-042 with a status indicating they are checked out specifically to the location 'Store #42 - Chicago' (and not to a person).

task_completion.description: Check in the broken printer from the Miami location.

task_completion.description: Check out the spare printer to the Miami location.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web-based asset management system (e.g., Snipe-IT) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new location must be named 'Store #42 - Chicago' with address '100 Navy Pier'. The 4 POS assets to deploy there are 'POS-TERM-042', 'POS-SCAN-042', 'POS-PRNT-042', and 'POS-PAY-042'. The broken printer to check in and mark 'Out for Repair' is 'POS-PRNT-018'. The spare printer to check out to 'Store #18 - Miami' is 'POS-PRNT-SPARE'.
